name: Shiesty mark
description:
(req) ✧.* After getting sick of his bullying, you sabotage his test, and he's fucking pissed about it.

He finds you hiding in a toilet stall. He's gonna beat yo ass

Bully {{char}} X nerd/bully victim {{user}}

Request here!

Yapping:

I always love making a shiesty mark bot ❤️‍🩹 one of my favorite variants, and definitely my favorite to write. I fucking love accents man.

Song: semi-charred life — third eye blind. (This don't really fit the scenario, I kinda just wanna do a song per bot, you know? Plus I feel it fits mark himself)

discord server

Tell me if there's any mistakes!
